title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker20: Kconfig.defconfig
notes: Commit: 3a1a3d3 - resolved Kconfig merge conflicts and xiao_s3_wio_sx1262 board comments during rebase for worker20-related bead. Cleaned resolution markers per AGENTS.md no-dead-code rule. Aborted complex rebase to avoid repeated conflicts.
